name: Crimea (Ukraine)

colors.symbolism: the past, including the ancient Greek colonies, the Cimmerian Bosporus and the Tatar Khanate
the present — equality, peace and a calm future
the heroic and tragic history of Crimea

description: Three horizontal stripes — a narrow blue stripe over a wide white stripe over a narrow red stripe, in proportions 1:6:1.
history: Adopted on 24 September 1992 by the Supreme Council of Crimea following a public design contest; the design was created by A. Malgin and V. Trusov. The flag has remained in use through the disputed 2014 Russian annexation and is recognised as the flag of the (Ukrainian) Autonomous Republic of Crimea and of the (Russian-administered) Republic of Crimea.
